title: Quanta Services 10-K Annual Reports
note: Lists Quanta's latest annual reports, including the 2026 filing for fiscal 2025, and anchors the company business and risk profile.

title: Quanta Services Statistics & Valuation
note: Used for current market capitalization, P/E ratio, revenue, earnings, and cash-flow context as of the publication refresh date.

title: Quanta Services Market Cap
note: Provided market-cap reference URL for the registry manifest and S&P 500 snapshot context.

title: LF Energy | Open Source for the Energy Transition
note: Supports open-source power-system software, grid interoperability, and shared digital infrastructure alternatives.

title: Open Infrastructure Map
note: Documents OpenInfraMap as an open infrastructure visualization layer using OpenStreetMap data for power, telecom, oil, gas, and water assets.

title: OpenEMS - Open Source Energy Management System
note: Documents OpenEMS as a modular open-source energy management system for storage, renewables, EV charging, and local energy control.

title: OpenADR FAQ
note: Explains OpenADR as an open interoperable information exchange model for automated demand response and grid flexibility.

title: OpenADR Specification
note: References the OpenADR specifications and schemas used to support interoperable demand-response implementations.
